ddls:
CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the household is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the household is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the household */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the household is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the household record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the household record was last updated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the household location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the household location */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the household */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Type of household (e.g., single, family, shared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the demographic data belongs to */,
  "income_over_100k" INTEGER /* Whether the household income is over $100,000 */,
  "age_over_40" INTEGER /* Whether any household member is over 40 years old */,
  "kids" INTEGER /* Number of kids in the household */,
  "more_than_one_income" INTEGER /* Whether the household has more than one income source */,
  "own" INTEGER /* Whether the household owns the residence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the household */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level of any household member */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the household */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the primary income earner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the income data belongs to */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of the income (e.g., job, investment) */,
  "income_amount" REAL /* Amount of the income */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the income data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the income data was last updated */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the income (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the income source */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the income source (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incomes_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the expense data belongs to */,
  "expense_category" TEXT /* Category of the expense (e.g., housing, transportation) */,
  "expense_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the expense data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the expense data was last updated */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the expense payment (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the expense (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the asset data belongs to */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., savings, investments) */,
  "asset_value" REAL /* Value of the asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the asset data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the asset data was last updated */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was acquired */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date of the asset (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debts" (
  "debt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debt entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the debt data belongs to */,
  "debt_type" TEXT /* Type of the debt (e.g., mortgage, credit card) */,
  "debt_amount" REAL /* Amount of the debt */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the debt data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the debt data was last updated */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the debt */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the debt (if applicable) */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of debt payments (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debts_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the prediction data belongs to */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the predictive model (e.g., regression, decision tree) */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was last updated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., income, expenses) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
